content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method area) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will try to keep edits localized to quantize().

agent1: thanks - fyi my workspace copy of src/PIL/Image.py doesn't show your error_threshold edits (likely isolated sandboxes per agent, each producing our own patch.txt for the evaluator). I've added sort_palette=None param to quantize() (values Image.SORT_LUMINANCE / Image.SORT_RGB), implemented via a new _sort_palette() helper that reuses remap_palette(). Added tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Done on my end - no action needed from you.
